logs.message: Package 'System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt' 7.0.3 has a known moderate severity vulnerability, https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-59j7-ghrg-fj52

Package Microsoft.AspNetCore.Owin 8.0.0 is not compatible with net48 (.NETFramework,Version=v4.8) / win-x86. Package Microsoft.AspNetCore.Owin 8.0.0 supports: net8.0 (.NETCoreApp,Version=v8.0)
Package Ocelot 18.0.0 is not compatible with net48 (.NETFramework,Version=v4.8) / win-x86. Package Ocelot 18.0.0 supports: net6.0 (.NETCoreApp,Version=v6.0)
